Best Free Alternatives to Runway (2026)

Looking for a free or cheaper alternative to Runway? Here are the top options.

Midjourney

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.

💲 Paid only

DALL-E

OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.

✅ Free tier available

Leonardo AI

AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.

✅ Free tier available

CapCut

Free AI-powered video editor popular for short-form social content.

✅ Free tier available
